items.name: dify
items.description: Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development.

items.name: open-webui
items.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)

items.name: claude-mem
items.description: Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent –  Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More

items.name: PaddleOCR
items.description: Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

items.name: ragflow
items.description: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

items.name: graphify
items.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

items.name: hello-agents
items.description: 📚 《从零开始构建智能体》——从零开始的智能体原理与实践教程

items.name: anything-llm
items.description: Stop renting your intelligence. Own it with AnythingLLM. Everything you need for a powerful local-first agent experience

items.name: mem0
items.description: Universal memory layer for AI Agents

items.name: llm-app
items.description: Ready-to-run cloud templates for RAG, AI pipelines, and enterprise search with live data. 🐳Docker-friendly.⚡Always in sync with Sharepoint, Google Drive, S3, Kafka, PostgreSQL, real-time data APIs, and more.

items.name: headroom
items.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

items.name: llama_index
items.description: LlamaIndex is the leading document agent and OCR platform

items.name: JeecgBoot
items.description: AI 低代码平台「低代码 + 零代码」双驱动！低代码可一键生成前后端代码;零代码可 5 分钟搭建系统;AI Skills 一句话画流程、设计表单、生成整套系统。内置 AI聊天、知识库、流程编排、MCP插件等，兼容主流大模型。引领「AI 生成 → 在线配置 → 代码生成 → 手工合并->AI修改」开发模式，消除 Java 项目 80% 的重复工作，提效而不失灵活。
